quote: He utilizado la app durante estos días y la verdad es que si eres muy activo/a es algo que no viene nada mal. Sobre todo para quitarte quebraderos de cabeza y siempre estar al día con lo que ha podido pasar.
name: Senbetsu

quote: La aplicación es muy clara y fácil de utilizar me permite registrar todo bien y que tenga el Apple salud es un extra muy bueno.
name: Adan López

quote: Es Genial !! se puede registrar, muchas cosas y esta ideal, para las personas que estan, estables con una sola pareja.
name: BeShära Fernandez

quote: This is an amazing utility app for anyone trying to track all their sexual events throughout the day. Whether you're a solo sensation or you partner with anyone you can. It lets you keep track of your partners as well as the feelings you experience during your intimate time. Though I must say that the feelings list needs a few more. Also the app needs a way to indicate which partner is a spouse of yours so you can keep track of your intimate moments with them separately. Thank you.
name: G Squirrel
